title: T-085 — E2E Playwright: reference CSV import → preview → commit happy path
prompt:
# T-085 — E2E Playwright: reference CSV import → preview → commit happy path

## Goal
E2E reference CSV import wizard.

Use small fixture CSVs in apps/web/e2e/fixtures/. This E2E depends on SET-053 UI from T-096 plus import actions from T-022.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/e2e/reference-csv.spec.ts

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Preview counts correct.
- Commit persists.
- Header mismatch blocks.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: write spec + fixtures. GREEN: ensure UI.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip the two-step preview/commit pattern.
